brand_gradient.text_class: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-[#004CB6] via-[#9ED9A4] to-[#D92822]

surfaces.card_flat: bg-[#0a0a0a] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300
surfaces.gradient_ring_card: relative p-[1px] rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-[#004CB6] via-[#FFC108] to-[#D92822] overflow-hidden

motion_and_interactions.hero_animation: Slow pulsing gradient orbs in background, upward stagger fade-in for typography
motion_and_interactions.horizontal_scroll: Pin the section, translate X based on scroll Y to create a cinematic gallery of the 5 products
motion_and_interactions.button_hover: Scale 1.05, subtle glow matching brand gradient, text remains high contrast
motion_and_interactions.smooth_scroll: lenis for momentum scrolling (Critical for Awsmd feel)

components.navigation: Sticky, glassmorphism header. JOTEC logo left, links center, Contact CTA right.
components.hero: Full viewport height. Massive 'Cabinet Grotesk' typography. Animated mesh gradient in JOTEC colors interacting with the dark background.
components.product_story_scroll: A sticky horizontal scrolling section. 5 distinct cinematic slides for Speed Editor, Replay Editor, Editor Keyboard, Micro Color Panel, Mini Panel.
components.comparison_grid: Bento-style CSS grid, showing specs (Bluetooth, tactile keys, machined metal, etc.) with dark, minimalist cards and subtle 1px inner borders.
components.contact_form: Shadcn UI form wrapped in a dark cinematic section. Use Input, Textarea with bg-transparent border-white/10 focus:border-[#07A6E6].

images.description: DaVinci Resolve Speed Editor / Mini Panel

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL REQUIRED FONTS: Import Cabinet Grotesk (from Fontshare or local) and Manrope (Google Fonts).
INSTALL LIBRARIES: yarn add framer-motion @studio-freight/lenis @phosphor-icons/react lucide-react

STORYTELLING SCROLL: Implement a sticky horizontal scroll section for the 5 products using Framer Motion (useScroll, useTransform). As the user scrolls down, the viewport is pinned and content slides horizontally.

GRADIENT USAGE: Use the JOTEC gradient carefully. Do not paint entire backgrounds. Use it for text clips, 1px glowing borders around active products, or blurred background orbs (mesh gradient) behind the hero.

CONTACT FORM: Build a working backend integration (MongoDB) for the form. Design should be flat, border-bottom only inputs, or highly styled dark mode Shadcn inputs with focus states mapped to #07A6E6.
Do NOT use placeholder text for logos. ALWAYS use the provided JOTEC logo URL.
